_meta.description: Machine-readable routing map: eight NotebookLM notebooks → Drive pillar sources
_meta.rule: One source per notebook. No duplication across pillars. Point at pillar folder, not individual files.

notebooks.name: SACRED.CORE
notebooks.purpose: Root axioms, philosophy, OS logic, resonance doctrine
sacred_prompts: What are the 5 most consistent principles across all sources?
Where do my beliefs contradict each other?
Refine this into a universal law system
notebooks.nlm_update_trigger: any file added or modified in 04_SACRED_CODEX

notebooks.name: LORE.VAULT
sacred_prompts: Map all relationships between characters
Find inconsistencies in the timeline
What emotional themes connect these stories?
notebooks.nlm_update_trigger: any file added or modified in 04_SACRED_CODEX/LORE

notebooks.name: GAME.SYSTEMS
sacred_prompts: Turn this philosophy into a playable mechanic
Balance this system for long-term engagement
Create progression tiers from beginner to master
notebooks.nlm_update_trigger: any file added or modified in 03_NEURAL_FOREST

notebooks.name: KNOWLEDGE.VAULT
notebooks.purpose: Research, spiritual frameworks, psychology, AI theory
sacred_prompts: What patterns connect these different sources?
Combine these ideas into a new framework
What am I missing?

notebooks.name: FAMILY.LEGACY
notebooks.purpose: Sacred Messages (Iris and Asher), journals, life systems
sacred_prompts: What lessons repeat across my messages?
Turn this into a timeless principle
Adapt this message for different ages
notebooks.security_note: Only NOTEBOOKLM_SAFE subfolder. Never index _PERSONAL root.

notebooks.name: CREATION.LAB
notebooks.purpose: Brain dumps, idea seeds, unfinished experiments
sacred_prompts: What is this idea really?
What category does this belong in?
Turn this into SacredSpace canon

notebooks.name: SACRED.SIGNAL
notebooks.purpose: Brand voice, Sacred Signal strategy, @OAKEYTREE content
key_documents: Signal Strategy brand voice doc (326 lines)
sacred_prompts: What voice patterns define Sacred Signal?
Which posts have the highest resonance potential?
What is the underlying teaching in this content?

notebooks.name: SACRED.MARKET
notebooks.purpose: Commercial strategy, SacredArcana Studios brand, market intel
sacred_prompts: What is the core value proposition?
Where is the market underserved relative to our strengths?
What offerings are ready to launch vs. still forming?
notebooks.nlm_update_trigger: any file added or modified in 09_SACRED_MARKET
